title: TS10 4RG, Power Minerals Limited: permit surrender issued - EPR/DB3606TQ/S002
body: "The Environment Agency publish surrenders that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the surrender letter and decision document for:   Operator name: Power Minerals Limited Installation name: Biolite Treatment Centre Permit number: EPR/DB3606TQ/S002  "
